headline: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q2 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Illinois Tool Works (ITW), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended June 2026.
